title: [Cobblemon] MythRecipe
description: Add crafting recipe for all MythsAndLegends items + certains Cobblemon item + some Minecraft Endgame item
body:
**MythRecipe for Cobblemon** is a Datapack adding many crafting recipe for:
1. **Myths and Legends** [https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-myths-and-legends-sidemod]
1. **Cobblemon** [https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon]
1. **CobblemonArmors** [https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-armors]
1. **Fae's Cobblemizer** [https://modrinth.com/mod/faes-cobblemizer]

**If you have any problem or feedback to address me, Discord DM are open (links on the right)**

**> Check the gallery to see all the craft that i've add or use JEI to see it directly ingame**

Adding craft Recipe for these different item:
- _**COBBLEMON ITEM**_
1. Ability Capsule
